reviews.review_description: I see all the copys of games (dont send hate)

developer_response.body:
Hi, thanks for playing. What do you mean by copying?

You played an outdated version of the game, if you tried the game on other sites let us know. In the meantime, I suggest you follow us for new developments of the game

reviews.review_description: I tried this demo, very nice. I also tried the new demo on SideQuest (don't know why it's not updated here) really cool. Can't wait to see the final game
SO FUN but needs more physical activity

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing! Chapter 1 of our independent game will be available soon, we don't have a date at th e moment, but it will most likely be this summer. Please follow us for news. ^-^

reviews.review_description: Needs physics and make the game lore longer I’d recommend buying this :)

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing! Chapter 1 of our independent game will be available soon, we don't have a date at th e moment, but it will most likely be this summer. Please follow us for news.

reviews.review_description: I just got the game I definitely prefer getting the game it's just SO GOOD 👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍 get game right now it's a free bonelab knockoff

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing :) Project: A.R.M. is the brainchild of the developers, no free copies of other games :) follow us because there will be many new updates. The game will be released soon and you can find the new trailer in our social

reviews.review_description: It's a good idea, but it needs a better execution, graphics and either longer game time of lore.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! This demo is out of date (unfortunately we had some problems) on sidequest there is the updated one. Also the first part of the final game will be released soon! ^-^

reviews.review_description: Very good game the physics are great I play it all the time

developer_response.body: thanks for playing! We will soon publish the vertical slice of the game... stay tuned!
